title: 10 Things You're Trading For Your Phone at Night
caption:
The phone isn't neutral. It's taking something.

Not just time — that's the least of it. It's taking the formation that happens in silence. The prayer that has no competition. The thought God gets to finish. The morning you wake up having actually rested.

Every night you hand it your last hour, you're paying a price you can't add up until you're years in and wondering where the man you were supposed to become went.

Put it down. Even tonight. Even just the last hour.

—

Save this. Send it to the brother who's been trying to quit.

#faith #godlymen #thefight #phone #christianmen #manofgod #discipline #disciplineequalsfreedom
